title: ALBANY HELPING HANDS THRIFT STORE - 211info
text: ALBANY HELPING HANDS THRIFT STORE ALBANY HELPING HANDS THRIFT STORE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides a store of used and new items including clothing, appliances, household and kitchen items, electronics, books, and linens. Offers vouchers to use at the thrift store for clothing and household goods to anyone in need. Also accepts donations. 705 First Avenue SE Albany, OR 97321 Eligibility: Thrift Store: Unrestricted Clothing and household goods vouchers: Unrestricted; once every 30 days Hours: Thrift Store: Monday-Saturday 9am-5pm Donations: Monday-Saturday 9am-5pm Email (541) 791-5139 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 791-5139 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Thrift Store: Walk in Vouchers: Request at store register or call for more information Donations: Visit website or call prior to dropping items off to check the list of items not accepted FEES: Varies by item 50% Discount Days: Tuesdays for age 60 and older, Thursdays for Veterans DOCUMENTS: None LANGUAGES: English, Spanish AREA SERVED: Benton and Linn Counties Services: Bedding/Linen Donation Programs Camping Gear Donation Programs Clothing Donation Programs Clothing Vouchers Electronics/Small Appliance Donation Programs Furniture/Home Furnishings Donation Programs Household Goods Vouchers Kitchenware Donation Programs Sports Equipment Donation Programs Thrift Shops If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
